_note: Real supplier invoices for 2026-05 (ingested from data/kralik/may/bills/). Aquatim invoice TMA10/1015526960 (total 1934.29) is split across two bill templates: BILL_APA_RECE now carries three separate lines — apa rece potabilă 907.16 + canalizare 878.57 + penalități 34.08 = 1819.81 (invoice gross) — and BILL_APA_METEO carries canal apă meteorică 114.48. FLAGS: (1) per-unit WATER_COLD submeter readings are NOT available for May — without them the water split falls back to equal; branch branșament reading is 106 m³ (index 916→1022). (2) Retim billed 21 persoane (potential residents update). (3) Curățenie 840.00 invoice (RICH CLEAN RC 0093, 08.07.2026) is for service month IUNIE 2026 — confirm it belongs to the May close. (4) ADMINISTRARE/COMISION_BANCA/INTERFON amounts (800/12/336) were user-supplied — no PDF in the folder. (5) PPC is billed to an individual (KORB ADRIAN) and nets a -3.95 credit; curent scară is charged at 68.88 (total de plată, net of credit) to match the association's Data-MAI sheet, though the invoice gross is 72.83. Allocation methods for interfon (EQUAL) and curățenie (BY_CPI) were corrected in def.json to match that sheet. (6) No 2026-04 period exists yet — this is the May packet.

meters._note: Branch (branșament) cold-water reading for apa-dif: index nou 1022 − index vechi 916 = 106 m³ (period 22.04–21.05.2026).

unitMeasures._note: Per-unit May readings ingested from the 'Data - MAI' sheet of 'Gh Lazar 4 - Date Istorice - 202615.xlsx': water_cold = column 'Apa rece-Consum(m³)', residents = column 'Pers. Prez.'. To be loaded as UNIT PeriodMeasure for 2026-05 (WATER_COLD/ADMIN, RESIDENTS/DECLARATION). FLAGS: (a) Σ submeters = 41.20 m³ vs branch 106 m³ → residual 64.80 m³ (~61%); high, likely unread submeters or a period mismatch (branch covers 22.04–21.05, sheet may be mid-entry) — affects APA_DIF mode only, not PROPORTIONAL. (b) AP 31 (U25) water_cold = -8.97 is a negative meter correction carried from source. Σ residents = 26.

items._note: amount = 68.88 (total de plată, net of -3.95 PPC credit); invoice gross 72.83
